author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: GPU Adam step will use decomposed ops via the GpuBackend trait — scale_f32, mul_f32, add_f32, sub_f32, sqrt_f32, div_f32. This avoids a fused kernel (complex PTX) while keeping everything on GPU. Need to add update_storage_gpu() to Tensor to swap the GPU buffer handle in-place for the parameter update (current update_data only takes CPU slices). State will be stored as Tensor<T> on the parameter's device.
